commands.command: g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/tests/test_tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp -o cpp/build/test_tokenizer.exe ; if($?) { cpp/build/test_tokenizer.exe }

g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/tests/test_parser.cpp cpp/src/parser/parser.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp -o cpp/build/test_parser.exe ; if($?) { cpp/build/test_parser.exe }
g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/tests/test_ast.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp -o cpp/build/test_ast.exe; if ($?) { cpp/build/test_ast.exe }

commands.description: 符号表和类型检查测试
commands.command: g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/tests/test_semantic.cpp cpp/src/semantic/symbol_table.cpp cpp/src/semantic/type_checker.cpp cpp/src/parser/parser.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp -o cpp/build/test_semantic.exe; if ($?) { cpp/build/test_semantic.exe }

commands.description: SSA IR 和优化器测试
commands.command: g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/tests/test_ssa_ir.cpp cpp/src/ir/ssa_ir.cpp cpp/src/ir/optimizer.cpp cpp/src/bytecode/bytecode_generator.cpp -o cpp/build/test_ssa_ir.exe; if ($?) { cpp/build/test_ssa_ir.exe }

g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/src/compiler/cgc.cpp cpp/src/parser/parser.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp cpp/src/semantic/symbol_table.cpp cpp/src/semantic/type_checker.cpp cpp/src/ir/ssa_ir.cpp cpp/src/ir/optimizer.cpp cpp/src/bytecode/bytecode_generator.cpp -o cpp/build/cgc.exe

g++ -std=c++17 -I cpp/include cpp/src/compiler/cgd.cpp cpp/src/parser/parser.cpp cpp/src/lexer/tokenizer.cpp cpp/src/ast/ast_printer.cpp cpp/src/semantic/symbol_table.cpp cpp/src/semantic/type_checker.cpp cpp/src/ir/ssa_ir.cpp cpp/src/ir/optimizer.cpp cpp/src/bytecode/bytecode_generator.cpp -o cpp/build/cgd.exe

commands.description: 编译器和反汇编器测试
commands.command: cpp/build/cgc.exe -v -IR -debug cpp/examples/test.cg -o cpp/examples/test.cgb ; if($?) { cpp/build/cgd.exe cpp/examples/test.cgb }
